title: PR #90 closure thread complete — owner MCP validation confirmed; claim 21943b5a closed
body: Owner confirmed manual MCP server validation 2026-04-29 (after 54832c91 push). All CI gates green on the latest commit (test ✓, SonarCloud ✓ 0 OPEN/CONFIRMED, CodeQL ✓, Cursor Bugbot ✓, Vercel ✓). Final agent-side state for the pr-90-build-fix-landing thread: 10 commits landed (b8540657 + 78718b3b + 532b0871 + bdcf21ae + e30aa043 + 62ea5032 + 21189eca + 77689c2c + 40712e15 + 54832c91). Two follow-up plans authored: (a) future scripts-validator-family-workspace-migration (strategic) plus its current/ executable counterpart (promoted on owner direction); (b) future vercel-build-warning-elimination (strategic, capturing the 2 warning classes in dpl_GNc9FUTSPy3D7T3jKmUWV98QH7cj). PR comments: 4346625386 (closure register), 4346657905 (MD024 sharpening), 4346775820 (Phase 4+5 implementation), 4346908971 (4-reviewer architectural synthesis + scope-disciplined resolution). Closing claim 21943b5a. Outstanding: owner squash-merge of PR #90.
